race.comment: Suspect it's already been a big day for Pike, and the good times can roll on with POBLANO (2) who returns and looks to make it three on the bounce. Was unlucky to miss on debut back in December, otherwise it'd be four. Looks a handy type and she takes fitness from a Lark Hill trial placing. Great chance to bring up the hat-trick. EFFORTLESSLY (5) rattled home to arrive just in time two back. Couldn't quite repeat the dose as favourite last time but was still strong into second. Gets weight off with the claim and is drawn much kinder. Is sure to be very competitive. JELLYBEAN JONES (3) finished second when resuming two runs back at Albany then progressed nicely last time out to score comfortably at Albany. Is open to further improvement third-up and warrants following up. INCANDESCENT LADY (10) has good early speed and gets in light with the 3kg claimer on. Expect her to give her a sight.
